channel.title: Building Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in Building Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: Lego Friends Leo s Room 41754 Baking Themed Bedroom Playset Collectible Toy for Girls and Boys with Olly Mini-Doll Accessories & Pet
item.description: There’s a deal Lego Friends Leo s Room 41754 Baking Themed Bedroom Playset Collectible Toy for Girls and Boys with Olly Mini-Doll Accessories & Pet here: ℹ️: This mini-doll playset includes many cool accessories: a recipe book, mixing bowl, spoon, bottles, camera plus cool light for the camera Playset includes LEGO Friends mini-dolls: baker Leo and video expert Olly to help filming, plus Churro the Cat figure Leos house in Harmony Beach includes surfboard toy plus bunk beds and a balcony to go outside and play football on when the filming is finished Let kids discover all the rooms of the Heartlake City; check out other collectible toy playsets like Aliyas Room (41740) or Novas Room (41755) This collectible LEGO Friends Leos Room playset toy features a studio and video equipment, a baking area plus 2 mini-dolls and a cat figure In 2023, the LEGO Friends universe expanded to present a new series of characters and fun locations inspired by childrens passions and interests This LEGO Friends Bedroom x000D 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO DOTS Ultimate Party Kit 41806 Arts & Crafts Kit Perfect for Kids Birthday Party Age 6-10 Party Bag Fillers Birthday Party Games and Crafts with Toy Cupcakes Friendship Bracelets Bunting
item.description: You can find LEGO DOTS Ultimate Party Kit 41806 Arts & Crafts Kit Perfect for Kids Birthday Party Age 6-10 Party Bag Fillers Birthday Party Games and Crafts with Toy Cupcakes Friendship Bracelets Bunting with a discount here: ℹ️: LEGO DOTS Ultimate Party craft kit for kids features party games and DIY party bag fillers, 6 toy cupcakes, 6 toy bracelets and 6 bunting pieces This LEGO DOTS party craft kit for kids Ages 6 and up makes a great gift and fun party games activity for kids birthdays or get-togethers The birthday party games set includes loads of tiles, charms, a shareable sticker sheet and lots of easy to follow design inspiration for kids Girls and boys Ages 6+ will love help prep for the party, build LEGO DOTS cupcakes and create their own party bag toys for their guests It’s a LEGO DOTS party!

item.title: LEGO Marvel Attack on New Asgard Thor Buildable Toy 76207 with Hammer Stormbreaker and Monster Figure Love and Thunder Movie Set
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Marvel Attack on New Asgard Thor Buildable Toy 76207 with Hammer Stormbreaker and Monster Figure Love and Thunder Movie Set here: ℹ️: Super-Hero monster battles – With LEGO Marvel Attack on New Asgard (76207), kids can be part of the Marvel Studios’ Thor: Love and Thunder movie action Jointed for posability – Standing over 4 in. (11 cm) tall, the posable Shadow Monster inspires endless imaginative role play and can be put on display when the day’s battles are over Endless play possibilities – Kids recreate movie scenes and play out adventures of their own as they battle the twisting, turning, grabbing, nipping Shadow Monster Gift for kids – Put Marvel action into the hands of Thor fans aged 7 and up, with this movie-based birthday or holiday gift Iconic Marvel characters – Includes Thor, Mighty Thor and Gorr minifigures, plus a buildable Shadow Monster with jointed arms and claws for imaginative play and display 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Disney Princess Jasmine and Mulan Adventure 43208 Palace Set Aladdin & Mulan Buildable Toy with Horse and Tiger Figures Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys
item.description: You can find LEGO Disney Princess Jasmine and Mulan Adventure 43208 Palace Set Aladdin & Mulan Buildable Toy with Horse and Tiger Figures Gifts for Kids Girls & Boys with a discount here: ℹ️: Princess Jasmine doll can pop up to the balcony to admire the view. Wait, who’s that? Yay, it’s Mulan, Khan and Cri-kee, coming to visit! Using the LEGO Building Instructions app, builders can zoom, rotate and visualize a digital version of their model as they build Kids will love this set full of imaginative possibilities, with settings based on 2 well-known Disney movies: Mulan and Aladdin Features a detailed palace toy with 2 floors and a small shrine, plus plenty of accessories to spark fun everyday play sessions Includes Disney’s Princess Jasmine and Mulan mini doll figures, plus Khan the toy horse, Rajah the tiger LEGO animal figures Hop onto the magic carpet and take a trip to Mulan’s shrine to see the plum blossom before you head back to the palace!

item.title: LEGO City Stuntz Smashing Chimpanzee Stunt Loop 60338 Building Toy Set for Boys Girls and Kids Ages 7+ 226 Pieces
item.description: You can find LEGO City Stuntz Smashing Chimpanzee Stunt Loop 60338 Building Toy Set for Boys Girls and Kids Ages 7+ 226 Pieces with a discount here: ℹ️: This set can be combined with other toys from the LEGO City Stuntz range: 60331Touring Stunt Bike for even bigger stunt-show extravaganzas This LEGO City Stuntz set features a stunt course with loop, springboard and mechanical chimpanzee stunt prop and a flywheel-powered stunt bike This LEGO stunt racer toy also includes a spectator stand, LEGO flames, plants, a camera, a hot dog and ice cream accessory elements Kids push the toy motorcycle to activate the flywheel to ride the loop, jump on the toy ramp and dodge the mechanical chimpanzees smash down LEGO City Stuntz Smashing Chimpanzee Stunt Loop action toy makes a great birthday or any occasion gift for kids aged 7+ This action toy for kids aged 7+ also includes 3 minifigures; the Stuntz Airborne Elite Pilot and 2 spectators to play-out stunt show action 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Friends Dog Rescue Bike Building Set Pretend Play Animal Toy Playset for Pet-Loving Kids Girls and Boys Ages 6 and Up with Puppy Toy Pet Figure and 2 Mini-Dolls 41738
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Dog Rescue Bike Building Set Pretend Play Animal Toy Playset for Pet-Loving Kids Girls and Boys Ages 6 and Up with Puppy Toy Pet Figure and 2 Mini-Dolls 41738 at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO Friends animal playset features Aliya - a scout leader and her younger friend Victoria mini-dolls, plus a cute toy puppy figure Accessories in this LEGO Friends animal rescue set include food and water for the puppy, binoculars, a helmet, bone, poo, litter bin, and poster Part of the new generation of Heartlake City with 2023 LEGO Friends characters and sets, check out more; including Dog Rescue Van (41741) The trailer opens at the front and back to let the puppy inside with Victoria; Aliya can ride the toy bike to take them home after their mission There are lots of cool features in this animal playset; the park scene features a bench and a moving bush that lifts to reveal the missing pup Give pet-loving kids a treat with this LEGO Friends Dog Rescue Bike animal playset, featuring toy bike with removable trailer and a park scene Kids Ages 6+ can use the dog poo and pawprint clues to help LEGO Friends Aliya and Victoria search Heartlake City and find the missing puppy 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Disney and Pixar’s Lightyear Zyclops Chase 76830 Space Robot Building Toy for Kids 4 Plus Year Old with Mech Action Figure and Buzz Minifigure
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Disney and Pixar’s Lightyear Zyclops Chase 76830 Space Robot Building Toy for Kids 4 Plus Year Old with Mech Action Figure and Buzz Minifigure at the following link: ℹ️: Buildable action toy for Buzz Lightyear fans – Creative set comes with LEGO Buzz Lightyear and Izzy minifigures kitted out in spacesuit helmets and armor, a posable, buildable mech toy Birthday gift for play and display – Buildable mech toy stands over 4 in.

item.title: LEGO City Police Station Chase 60370 Playset with Car Toy and Motorbike Breakout Jail 4 Minifigures and Dog Figure Toys for Kids 4 Plus Years Old
item.description: You’ve got LEGO City Police Station Chase 60370 Playset with Car Toy and Motorbike Breakout Jail 4 Minifigures and Dog Figure Toys for Kids 4 Plus Years Old at the following link: ℹ️: This police station playset includes 2 police officer and 2 crook minifigures plus accessories: a gem, police radio, key, cups and a megaphone This LEGO City Police station playset makes a fab birthday gift for kids Ages 4 plus who love police vehicles, toy motorbikes and lots of action Action-packed adventures await with this LEGO City 4+ set with a toy police station, police car toy and dog figure, plus a crook’s motorbike This LEGO City 4+ set includes a Starter Brick to give young kids a head start with their construction toys, plus a simple pictorial building guide Also includes 4 minifigures for kids to role-play; children can attach the chain from the motorbike toy to activate the jailbreak function 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Super Mario Ice Mario Suit and Frozen World Expansion Set 71415 Collectible Buildable Game with Figure Costume Plus Cooligan and Goomba Enemy Figures
item.description: You can find LEGO Super Mario Ice Mario Suit and Frozen World Expansion Set 71415 Collectible Buildable Game with Figure Costume Plus Cooligan and Goomba Enemy Figures with a discount here: ℹ️: Kids can fit the LEGO Mario interactive figure (not included) into an ice suit that allows for an ice ball graphic on its tummy screen for added performance. to reveal. This modular set is rebuildable and combines with other LEGO Super Mario collectible toy sets to expand the Super Mario buildable game world Skating on the buildable ice plate triggers skating sounds from LEGO Mario.

item.title: LEGO Super Mario Yoshi s Gift House Expansion Building Toy Set 71406 - Featuring Iconic Yoshi and Monty Mole Figures Great Gift for Boys Girls Kids or Fans of The Games and Movie Ages 6+
item.description: You can find LEGO Super Mario Yoshi s Gift House Expansion Building Toy Set 71406 - Featuring Iconic Yoshi and Monty Mole Figures Great Gift for Boys Girls Kids or Fans of The Games and Movie Ages 6+ with a discount here: ℹ️: Iconic Characters Included - This LEGO Super Mario expansion set features beloved Yoshi and Monty Mole figures, enhancing the interactive game experience. Yoshis Interactive Home - Players can greet the Yoshi figure at the door, enjoy a nap in Yoshis bed, pick fruits, and take a spin on the Treat Merry-Go-Round.

item.title: LEGO Avatar Floating Mountains Site 26 & RDA Samson 75573 Building Set - Helicopter Toy Featuring 5 Minifigures and Direhorse Animal Figure Movie Inspired Set Gift Idea for Kids Ages 9+
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Avatar Floating Mountains Site 26 & RDA Samson 75573 Building Set - Helicopter Toy Featuring 5 Minifigures and Direhorse Animal Figure Movie Inspired Set Gift Idea for Kids Ages 9+ here: ℹ️: Perfect Gift for Kids - Surprise kids who love nature and Avatar with this wonderful set as a great Christmas present or birthday gift idea for kids aged 9 years old and up. Simultaneous Building Fun - This set includes 3 building instruction booklets, allowing friends or family members to build different parts of the set at the same time for a shared experience.

item.title: LEGO Disney Princess Enchanted Journey Building Set - 3in1 Playset with Cinderella Jasmine Rapunzel Mini Dolls Toy Horse & Carriage Hot Air Balloon Gift for Girls Boys and Kids Ages 6+ 43216
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Disney Princess Enchanted Journey Building Set - 3in1 Playset with Cinderella Jasmine Rapunzel Mini Dolls Toy Horse & Carriage Hot Air Balloon Gift for Girls Boys and Kids Ages 6+ 43216 at the following link: ℹ️: Features 3 buildable modes of travel from Disneys Aladdin, Cinderella and Rapunzel, 3 LEGO Disney Princess mini-doll figures and 2 animal figures This LEGO | Disney Princess 3in1 buildable toy makes a magical creative gift for Disney fans, and kids Ages 6 plus years old Includes Disney Princesses Jasmin, Cinderella and Rapunzel LEGO mini-doll figures, plus a buildable toy horse and a baby elephant figure Enter a new world of building; builders can zoom in, rotate and track their progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder App for smart devices With this Disney Princess building toy playset kids join Rapunzel in her hot-air balloon, Jasmine on her carpet and Cinderella in her carriage This Disney Princess buildable playset features a hot air balloon with a lantern and telescope, a toy horse and carriage and a flying carpet Theres also a lounge build with elements to spark imaginative play: a seating area, tree, gold bowls, water fountain and flaming torch elements 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Minecraft The Training Grounds Toy Building Set 21183 Minecraft Toy for Kids Boys and Girls Age 8+ Years Old Building Kit with House Cave Trapdoor and Ninja Rogue and Bat Minecraft Figures
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Minecraft The Training Grounds Toy Building Set 21183 Minecraft Toy for Kids Boys and Girls Age 8+ Years Old Building Kit with House Cave Trapdoor and Ninja Rogue and Bat Minecraft Figures here: ℹ️: Build, play and display – LEGO Minecraft The Training Grounds (21183) is a rewarding building project, an exciting play experience and a spectacular model for kids to put on show A stand-out gift – This modular playset makes an ideal birthday present, holiday gift, or special treat for any Minecraft or model-making enthusiast aged 8 and up Endless play possibilities – Kids can rebuild and reconfigure this wonderfully customizable playset again and again to explore imaginative play-and-display possibilities that never end Iconic characters – The set includes a classic cast of Minecraft characters: a ninja, rogue, skeleton and a bat Big on fun – Measuring over 9.

item.title: LEGO DOTS Disney Mickey and Minnie Mouse Stitch-On Patch 41963 DIY Toy Badge Making Kit to Decorate Clothes Backpacks and More Craft Kit for Kids Aged 8 Plus
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO DOTS Disney Mickey and Minnie Mouse Stitch-On Patch 41963 DIY Toy Badge Making Kit to Decorate Clothes Backpacks and More Craft Kit for Kids Aged 8 Plus here: ℹ️: Pocket-sized portability – With the patch measuring over 2 in. (5 cm) square, there’s lots of space for kids to be creative and show off their Disney-inspired style: any time, any place Creativity in a box – This set works on its own for quick, imaginative originality.

item.title: LEGO Friends Paisley’s House 41724 Doll House Toy for Girls and Boys 4 Plus Years Old Playset with Accessories Including Bunny Figure Birthday Gift
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Paisley’s House 41724 Doll House Toy for Girls and Boys 4 Plus Years Old Playset with Accessories Including Bunny Figure Birthday Gift at the following link: ℹ️: The set features a starter brick for quick building plus instructions via the LEGO Builder app with tools to zoom and rotate models in 3D Includes 3 LEGO mini-dolls: Paisley, a shy girl who loves music, Ella and Jonathan, part of the new generation of LEGO Friends 2023 characters A great Easter, Christmas, or birthday gift idea or a special treat for kids ages 4 plus years old who love dolls houses and imaginative play with creative toys After exploring the house, kids can join Paisley in the garden where she loves to compose music on her guitar and say hello to pet bunny Melody This LEGO 4+ set includes doll house accessories: a brush, a guitar, kitchen utensils, food and more so children can invent their own stories Features a 2-story doll house toy for kids ages 4+ with removable top floor and lots of accessories, plus Paisley, Ella and Jonathan mini-dolls This toy doll house has rooms on the upper floor that can be separated, plus a cozy outdoor area with a hutch for the pet bunny figure 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO City Mobile Police Dog Training 60369 SUV Toy Car with Trailer Obstacle Course and Puppy Figures Animal Playset for Boys and Girls Ages 5 Plus
item.description: You can find LEGO City Mobile Police Dog Training 60369 SUV Toy Car with Trailer Obstacle Course and Puppy Figures Animal Playset for Boys and Girls Ages 5 Plus with a discount here: ℹ️: The back of the SUV police car toy can be opened and a pup placed in the back to take the training to a new location - dont forget the dog treats! This LEGO City Police Dog Training toy set can be given as a birthday gift for kids Ages 5 plus years old who love animal toys and police play This LEGO City police toy set features an SUV police car toy with trailer, a dog and puppy figure plus 3 activities to role-play a puppy training day Kids can help the toy LEGO animals into the cool K9 SUV toy car, place the activities in the trailer and head for the training ground The animal playset includes 2 minifigures, a seesaw, jump bar and stepping paws plus grooming brush, torch, shovel and dog treat accessories 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO DOTS Disney Mickey & Minnie Mouse Back-to-School Project Box 41964 6in1 Toy Arts and Crafts Building Set with Bag Tags Sticker Patch and Desk Tidy Creative Gift Idea for Kids Boys Girls 6+
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO DOTS Disney Mickey & Minnie Mouse Back-to-School Project Box 41964 6in1 Toy Arts and Crafts Building Set with Bag Tags Sticker Patch and Desk Tidy Creative Gift Idea for Kids Boys Girls 6+ here: ℹ️: Project box – This set is made for inspiring kids’ imaginative play, whether solo or in a group. Kids can also use any of the LEGO DOTS Extra DOTS tile Sets (sold separately) to expand their designs Endless designs – Stretch kids’ creative skills as they explore the Set, with 6 iconic DOTS items, plus lots of colored tiles and 10 exclusive Disney’s Mickey and Minnie-decorated tiles Creative play for ages 6+ – Any passionate crafts fan will love this premium Set.

item.title: LEGO Technic Snow Groomer to Snowmobile 42148 2in1 Vehicle Model Set Engineering Toys Winter Construction Toy for Kids Boys Girls 7+ Years Old Birthday Gift Idea
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Technic Snow Groomer to Snowmobile 42148 2in1 Vehicle Model Set Engineering Toys Winter Construction Toy for Kids Boys Girls 7+ Years Old Birthday Gift Idea here: ℹ️: Inspire a kid Ages 7+ to try new building challenges with the LEGO Technic Snow Groomer 2-in-1 building set and toy models of real-life snow vehicles This LEGO Technic 2-in-1 snow vehicle set makes a great birthday gift for kids age 7 plus years old who like winter and cool LEGO vehicle models The LEGO Technic Snow plough toy vehicle features rubber tires, moving tracks and levers to lift and lower the shovel blade and smoothing tool This 2-in-1 model adds an extra dimension to playtime: kids can dismantle the LEGO Technic snow groomer and rebuild it into a toy snowmobile LEGO Technic learning toys for kids help introduce young LEGO builders to engineering and mechanics in an approachable and realistic way 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars at-ST 75332 Toy Building Set - Featuring Wicket The Ewok and Scout Trooper Minifigures Expand Your Collection Great Gift for Preschool Kids Boys and Girls Ages 4+
item.description: You can find LEGO Star Wars at-ST 75332 Toy Building Set - Featuring Wicket The Ewok and Scout Trooper Minifigures Expand Your Collection Great Gift for Preschool Kids Boys and Girls Ages 4+ with a discount here: ℹ️: Posable Design - The AT-ST walker is posable and has a cockpit for the driver, the Ewok hideout features a tree and a catapult for Wicket to launch stone elements Perfect Gift - Fun and easy to build and rebuild, this LEGO Star Wars 4+ starter set makes a great birthday or Christmas present for creative kids and Star Wars fans alike Quick Build- This LEGO Star Wars AT-ST building toy for preschool kids aged 4+ years old features a quick build Starter Brick to help get the action started Assorted Minifigures - Includes Wicket the Ewok with a bow and arrow, a Scout Trooper, and an AT-ST Driver LEGO minifigures, each with a blaster for role-play fun Jump Into Action - Children can help brave Wicket the Ewok defend the lookout post from the Scout Trooper Speeder and the mighty AT-ST walker model 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO Avatar: The Way of Water Mako Submarine 75577 Buildable Toy Model Underwater Ocean Set with Alien Fish and Stingray Figures Movie Gift for Kids and Movie Fans
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Avatar: The Way of Water Mako Submarine 75577 Buildable Toy Model Underwater Ocean Set with Alien Fish and Stingray Figures Movie Gift for Kids and Movie Fans at the following link: ℹ️: Check out other sets in the range of LEGO Avatar building toys including Payakan the Tulkun and Crabsuit (75577) and Skimwing Adventure (75576) Includes a printed guide, plus kids can zoom in, rotate and view the models from all angles as they construct them with the LEGO Builder app One of the 3 Pandoran seabed settings has a display stand for kids to attach to the toy submarine and create an eye-catching room decoration piece This LEGO underwater set also includes Neteyam, Ao’nung, Spider and RDA Quaritch LEGO minifigures, plus an alien stingray figure, and a fish toy Kids can relive their favorite Avatar: The Way of Water scenes with this set featuring a submarine toy, 3 coral reef settings and 4 minifigures A Na’vi knife plus a toy bow with launchable arrows are also included in this Avatar: The Way of Water collectible Pandora set The Avatar Mako submarine model has cool functions including 2 opening cockpits with space for 1 minifigure each, and 3 movable propellers 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Ideas Sonic The Hedgehog – Green Hill Zone 21331 Collectible Set Nostalgic 90 s Gift Idea for Adults with Dr. Eggman Figure and Eggmobile
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Ideas Sonic The Hedgehog – Green Hill Zone 21331 Collectible Set Nostalgic 90 s Gift Idea for Adults with Dr. Eggman Figure and Eggmobile at the following link: ℹ️: Authentic details include a palm tree, bridge loop, rings and 2 buildable bonus item TV screens with 5 screen elements and 5 sticker options Delay the classic Sonic the Hedgehog video game and capture the LEGO style magic with this brick-built version of the famous game level .

The storage box, removable lid and colorful tiles will make a fun gift for kids with a passion for crafts Make it, design it, use it – Surprise any kid or arts-and-crafts fan with this LEGO DOTS Big Box (41960) craft Set.

item.title: LEGO Super Mario Creativity Toolbox Maker Set 71418 Create Your Own Levels with Figures Grass Desert and Lava Builds Starter Course Expansion Toy Gift Idea for Kids 6 Plus
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Super Mario Creativity Toolbox Maker Set 71418 Create Your Own Levels with Figures Grass Desert and Lava Builds Starter Course Expansion Toy Gift Idea for Kids 6 Plus at the following link: ℹ️: Includes buildable LEGO trees, flowers, hills, mushrooms, pyramids, signs and a Checkpoint Flag, plus classic look cloud and bush elements This Super Mario buildable game extension set also features 3 LEGO Super Mario collectible figures: Wendy, a Blue Yoshi and a Goomba LEGO Super Mario players upgrade and create new levels with this Creative Toolbox toy set featuring grass, lava, desert builds and 3 characters Super Mario building toys make fun and creative birthday gift ideas or treats for kids who already own a LEGO Super Mario Starter Course LEGO Super Mario Starter Packs (71360, 71387 or 71403, required for interactive play) and Expansion Packs recreate the iconic video game Features a fruit for Super Mario LEGO Mario, LEGO Luigi or LEGO Peach (figures not included), a gift box and a Super Mushroom with an Action Tag 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Creator Main Street 31141 Building Toy Set 3 in 1 Features a Toy City Art Deco Building Market Street Hotel Café Music Store and 6 Minifigures Endless Play Possibilities for Boys and Girls
item.description: You can find LEGO Creator Main Street 31141 Building Toy Set 3 in 1 Features a Toy City Art Deco Building Market Street Hotel Café Music Store and 6 Minifigures Endless Play Possibilities for Boys and Girls with a discount here: ℹ️: Endless play – LEGO fans ages 9 years old can build and rebuild 3 different city scenes: a street with a hotel, music store, record store and café, a 4-floor art deco apartment building, or an archway market street Access at the back – Each model is open at the back so kids can turn the models around and enjoy playing out fun stories with the hotel, cafe and music store and accessories Packed with accessories – Accessories in the Main Street include a coffee machine and musical instruments, the art deco skyscraper features a fridge and a desk and the archway market street has a chaise longue 6 minifigures – Includes a coffee shop worker, a hotel receptionist, a singer, a wheelchair user, a child and a store clerk.

item.title: LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorian s N-1 Starfighter 75325 Building Set - The Book of Boba Fett Featuring Baby Yoda Grogu and Droid Toy Figures Birthday Gift idea for Kids Boys & Girls Ages 9+
item.description: You can find LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorian s N-1 Starfighter 75325 Building Set - The Book of Boba Fett Featuring Baby Yoda Grogu and Droid Toy Figures Birthday Gift idea for Kids Boys & Girls Ages 9+ with a discount here: ℹ️: Interactive Build - The LEGO Mandalorian buildable toy features a minifigure cockpit, cargo compartment and a spring loaded shooter to protect the crew Assorted Accessories - Includes a LEGO The Mandalorian minifigure with jet pack and darksaber accessories, Peli Motto minifigure with a wrench and a BD Droid figure Perfect Gift - This LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorians N-1 Starfighter buildable toy set makes a great gift for Star Wars fans, boys, and girls ages 9+ Build with Confidence - Clear, illustrated building instructions are included so even LEGO beginners can build this LEGO Star Wars building toy with confidence Iconic Adventures - Kids can place the included Baby Yoda LEGO figure in the starfighters passenger space to experience epic The Book of Boba Fett adventures Relive the Action - With this LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorians N-1 Starfighter buildable toy set, kids can relive The Book of Boba Fett stories on Tatooine 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO City 2023 Advent Calendar 60381 Christmas Holiday Countdown Playset Gift Idea to Countdown to Adventure with Daily Collectible Surprises

Makes a fun holiday gift for kids and fans of LEGO building sets ages 5 and up Packed with seasonal fun – Bring a festive feel to each and every day as kids count down to Christmas with the 2023 LEGO City Advent Calendar (60381) set No batteries required – The buildable LEGO toys and characters contained in this Christmas Advent Calendar are powered by little kids with big imaginations Dimensions – The LEGO City Advent Calendar box measures over 10 in.

item.title: LEGO Avatar Neytiri & Thanator vs. AMP Suit Quaritch 75571 Buildable Action Toy with Animal Figure and Pandora Scene Gift for Kids
item.description: You can find LEGO Avatar Neytiri & Thanator vs. AMP Suit Quaritch 75571 Buildable Action Toy with Animal Figure and Pandora Scene Gift for Kids with a discount here: ℹ️: The set is a great Christmas present or birthday gift idea for kids aged 9 and over - it can be combined with all other LEGO Avatar sets Kids and Avatar fans will enjoy this versatile building toy with a Thanator animal figure, AMP suit action figure and a Pandora rainforest scene This set includes 2 LEGO minifigures: Neytiri, carrying a crossbow, and Colonel Quaritch with his fearful AMP suit action figure with weapons When the day’s play is over, kids can set up a dynamic display with Neytiri and the Thanator posed to jump on the AMP-suited Colonel action figure This LEGO Avatar construction toy is designed for social engagement; with 3 instruction booklets, so friends or family can build together Kids can place the Neytiri minifigure on the back of the Thanator animal figure; ready to fly through the rainforest and battle the Colonel 🛒 Buy it!

item.title: LEGO DOTS Adhesive Patches Mega Pack 41957 Arts and Crafts 5-in-1 Mosaic Making Building Kit DIY Sticker Patches Gift Idea for Creative Kids Make Custom Designs for Notebooks Phone Cases and More
item.description: You’ve got LEGO DOTS Adhesive Patches Mega Pack 41957 Arts and Crafts 5-in-1 Mosaic Making Building Kit DIY Sticker Patches Gift Idea for Creative Kids Make Custom Designs for Notebooks Phone Cases and More at the following link: ℹ️: Set trends on the playground and decorate notebooks, phone cases, room décor items or any flat, hard surface with kids personalized designs This arts and crafts LEGO DOTS mosaic kit for children contains easy-to-follow pattern suggestions to inspire new designs for the personalized stickers This creative activity 5in1 toy for kids is great for solo play or to share with friends; kids can redesign the patches anytime to switch up their looks This cool arts and crafts set contains 5 8x8 adhesive patches in different colors for kids to design and stick on to any hard, level surface Kids can also use any of the Extra DOTS bags or Lots of DOTS boxes (sold separately) to expand their creative designs even further Includes a huge 450+ colorful tiles, 10 random decorated tiles and a tile remover so kids can decorate their mosaic sticker patches in unique ways Kids can create 1 big design by placing the 5 stickers together, or 5 separate designs to show off their creative style in different places 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Friends Holiday Camping Trip 41726 Toy Caravan with Car Toy Camper Van Pretend Play Toy Camping Set for Kids Girls and Boys 4+ Year Old Forest Adventure Set with Two Minifigures
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Holiday Camping Trip 41726 Toy Caravan with Car Toy Camper Van Pretend Play Toy Camping Set for Kids Girls and Boys 4+ Year Old Forest Adventure Set with Two Minifigures at the following link: ℹ️: This fun set includes a starter brick for the LEGO Friends toy car; a sturdy base that gives young builders a head start with their caravan toy A great birthday gift idea or a treat for a special day for kids Ages 4 plus years old who love camping, nature and cool LEGO vehicles Young adventurers find the perfect camping spot in the Heartlake City forest, snap pictures on the toy camera and settle in by the a cozy campfire This toy for kids Ages 4+ comes with Autumn and Aliya LEGO Friends mini-dolls, plus accessories: a camera, butterfly, campfire and marshmallows Kids can attach the toy caravan to the fun brightly-colored car and remove the caravans roof to explore the bedroom and kitchen area inside This LEGO Friends caravan toy with attachable toy car lets kids Ages 4+ role-play forest camping adventures with Aliya and Autumn mini-dolls In 2023, the LEGO Friends universe expanded to introduce playsets with new characters and new locations to inspire even more awesome adventures 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Friends Tree-Planting Vehicle 41707 Building Toy Set for Kids Girls and Boys Ages 6+ 336 Pieces

item.title: LEGO City Stuntz Bathtub Stunt Bike 60333 Building Toy Set for Kids Boys and Girls Ages 5+ 14 Pieces
item.description: You can find LEGO City Stuntz Bathtub Stunt Bike 60333 Building Toy Set for Kids Boys and Girls Ages 5+ 14 Pieces with a discount here: ℹ️: Includes everything you need to build flywheel-powered stunt bike, plus a Sudsy Simon LEGO racer minifigure from LEGO City Stuntz Features a fun flywheel powered toy motorcycle in the style of a bathtub, a bathing duck, snorkel, mask and lifejacket accessory elements Combine this set with other toys from the LEGO City Stuntz collection for even more action and amazing stunts Children can push the toy motorcycle to activate the flywheel, then release it so that the minifigure can do aerial tricks and wheelies The LEGO City Stuntz portable motorcycle toy for boys and girls aged 5+ puts them at the heart of the action - they can play wherever they go!

item.title: LEGO Star Wars The Mandalorian’s N-1 Starfighter Microfighter Building Toy Set for Kids Ages 6 and Up with Mando and Grogu Baby Yoda Minifigures Fun Gift Idea for Action Play 75363

item.title: LEGO Art Hokusai – The Great Wave 31208 3D Japanese Wall Art Craft Kit Framed Ocean Canvas Creative Activity Hobbies for Adults DIY Home Office Decor
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Art Hokusai – The Great Wave 31208 3D Japanese Wall Art Craft Kit Framed Ocean Canvas Creative Activity Hobbies for Adults DIY Home Office Decor here: ℹ️: Relax while building this LEGO wall Art set - scan the QR code to listen to the tailor-made soundtrack end enjoy a rewarding mindful experience This home decor craft kit for adults contains 1,810 pieces, 6 canvas bases, 2 hangers elements and a decorative tile with Hokusais signature Celebrate icons from the worlds of art, music and cinema with LEGO Art, crafts and creative activity kits for adults, and indulge in your hobbies The 3D Japanese artwork makes an eye-catching display piece and is a great home or office decor, and a brilliant gift for art and home design fans This tribute to Hokusai’s The Great Wave comes with a premium booklet with art details and instructions to guide you through the building process Bring one of the most iconic artworks of the last two centuries to life with the LEGO Art Hokusai - The Great Wave set, a DIY framed wall art piece 🛒 Buy it now!

Treasure Chest Surprise - Accessories include a treasure chest with a hidden egg inside, which kids can defend with the classic Minecraft diamond sword accessory.

item.title: LEGO DUPLO Wild Animals of Asia 10974 Bricks Set with Panda & Elephant Baby Animal Toy Figures Plus Sounds Toys for Toddlers Girls & Boys Age 2-5
item.description: You’ve got LEGO DUPLO Wild Animals of Asia 10974 Bricks Set with Panda & Elephant Baby Animal Toy Figures Plus Sounds Toys for Toddlers Girls & Boys Age 2-5 at the following link: ℹ️: LEGO DUPLO set features adult and baby elephant, tiger and panda animal toys, 2 red pandas, a monkey, 2 birds plus bamboo and cherry blossom trees Kids can place the pandas in the trees, play with the animal toys on the slide, swing the monkey on the vine and take a walk with the elephants LEGO DUPLO early development and activity toys for toddlers make fab birthday or Christmas gifts for boys and girls ages 2 plus years old This educational toy for toddlers and kids age 2-5 includes 11 animal figures and realistic sounds, so kids can explore Asian wildlife Treat a little explorer to other LEGO DUPLO animal sets: Wild Animals of South America (10973) and Wild Animals of Africa (10971) This fun packed animal toy building set with LEGO DUPLO Bricks helps to develop kids language, social, cognitive and fine motor skills Includes a foldable, 3-dimensional playmat and a sound brick that plays realistic noises & animal sounds for interactive adventure playtime 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO Gabby s Dollhouse Kitty Fairy’s Garden Party 10787 Building Toy with Tree House Swing Slide and Merry-Go-Round Includes Gabby and Pandy Paws Birthday Gift Sensory Toy for Kids Ages 4 and up
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Gabby s Dollhouse Kitty Fairy’s Garden Party 10787 Building Toy with Tree House Swing Slide and Merry-Go-Round Includes Gabby and Pandy Paws Birthday Gift Sensory Toy for Kids Ages 4 and up here: ℹ️: Magical garden playset – LEGO Kitty Fairy’s Garden Party (10787) takes kids ages 4+ into a magical garden filled with popular characters from DreamWorks Animation’s Gabbys Dollhouse Fun building guide – A printed picture guide shows the purpose of each building step and the LEGO Builder app offers digital zoom and rotate tools, so kids can visualize their model as they build Expand the fun – Explore the full range of LEGO sets from the Gabbys Dollhouse collection including 10785 Bakey with Cakey Fun, 10788 Gabbys Dollhouse, and 10786 Gabby & MerCats Ship & Spa Hands-on fun in the garden – The tree house and slide measures over 5 in.

item.title: LEGO Minecraft The Pumpkin Farm 21248 Building Toy Hands-on Action in The Swamp Biome Featuring Steve a Witch Frog Boat Treasure Chest and Pumpkin Patch Minecraft Toy for Boys and Girls Aged 8+
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Minecraft The Pumpkin Farm 21248 Building Toy Hands-on Action in The Swamp Biome Featuring Steve a Witch Frog Boat Treasure Chest and Pumpkin Patch Minecraft Toy for Boys and Girls Aged 8+ at the following link: ℹ️: Intuitive building instructions – Kids can download the LEGO Builder app for an immersive building experience, with digital tools to zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track progress Authentic action – The set features familiar Minecraft character Steve, plus a witch, a frog with frogspawn and lots of accessories, including a boat, treasure chest and a carved pumpkin Minecraft made real – LEGO Minecraft toy sets give kids a different way to enjoy the popular game, with mobs, scenes and features brought to life with the hands-on creativity of LEGO bricks Gift for kids– Give Minecraft players aged 8 and up a holiday, any-day or birthday gift with this versatile real-world Minecraft playset Quality guaranteed – LEGO components meet stringent industry quality standards to ensure they are consistent, compatible and easy to build with Safety assured – LEGO bricks and pieces are dropped, heated, crushed, twisted and analyzed to make sure they satisfy rigorous global safety standards Endlessly reconfigurable – The playset measures over 4 in.

item.title: LEGO Harry Potter 2023 Advent Calendar 76418 Christmas Countdown Playset with Daily Suprises Discover New Experiences with this Holiday Gift Featuring 18 Hogsmeade Village Mini Builds & 6 Minifigures
item.description: You can find LEGO Harry Potter 2023 Advent Calendar 76418 Christmas Countdown Playset with Daily Suprises Discover New Experiences with this Holiday Gift Featuring 18 Hogsmeade Village Mini Builds & 6 Minifigures with a discount here: ℹ️: Build inspiration for a magical Christmas – Let kids discover new experiences behind each door of the 2023 LEGO Harry Potter Advent Calendar (76418) and create their own Hogsmeade village adventures Illustrated instructions – Find a simple pictorial guide to building the daily surprises on the back of each door Holiday gift idea for ages 7 and up – Give this 227-piece building toy as a Christmas holiday gift to creative kids who love Harry Potter movies, books and games or LEGO Harry Potter playsets 18 Hogsmeade village mini builds – The Three Broomsticks Inn, the Hogs Head Inn, Zonko’s Joke Shop and Honeydukes candy store each have 2-3 builds relating to them, plus other festive items Part of an extensive assortment – LEGO Harry Potter toy building sets put favorite characters, familiar locations and magical adventures into the hands of all young wizards, witches and Muggles Many ways to play – The minifigures and buildable models inside this Christmas countdown playset can be combined with other LEGO Harry Potter sets for even more play-and-display possibilities Includes 6 Harry Potter minifigures – Harry Potter, Hermione Granger, Ron Weasley, Draco Malfoy, Aberforth Dumbledore and Madam Rosmerta, plus iconic items from the Harry Potter movies 🛒 Buy it!
